prompt: In a vertical reverie elongated into a 9:16 frame, a vision of sublime aesthetic grace unfolds where light and shadow softly embrace the sleek contours of a magnificent Steinway & Sons black grand piano. Seated at the keys, a woman of mesmerizing elegance commands the scene, her lithe and delicate figure draped in the beautiful contrast of a bright Chocolatey sleeveless tank top and a tailored Pink tight short latex skirt. Her flawless profile reveals striking, high-arched cheekbones and her face watching in camera with an expression of serene focus, radiating the dewy freshness of her twenties and the transcendent allure of high fashion. A large, vibrant red rose is tucked into her cascading, waist-length dark blonde short hair, a vivid burst of color that softly mirrors her luminous, fair complexion and the gentle warmth of the surrounding light. Her hands, poised with natural grace, rest upon the contrasting ivory and ebony keys, suspended in a moment of quiet musical devotion. Behind this portrait of harmonious beauty, soft, dusky pink curtains fall in textured, rhythmic folds, while a lush, verdant floral arrangement blooms quietly in the lower corner, completing a seamless tapestry of visual poetry that elevates the visible world to a state of ethereal perfection.
